raises.purpose: Working capital requirements and general corporate purposes
raises.source: BSE/NSE preferential issue allotment, 23-24 Jun 2025; CRISIL monitoring agency reports through Q4 FY26
raises.note: Allottees per public disclosure: Prakash Anand Chitrakar (promoter), plus Renuka Chitrakar, Gopikishan Damani, Atim Kabra among others. 18-month conversion window runs to 29 Dec 2026; as of the Q4 FY26 (Mar 2026) monitoring report, no conversions had occurred — INR43.49cr (25% upfront) received, INR130.50cr (75% balance) still pending exercise.
